steps.label: cause
steps.text: Producers communicate a recognizable regional image and deliver a relatively consistent style across export markets.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Clear positioning reduces consumer uncertainty, supports repeat purchase and gives distributors an easy category message.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: A modern, consistent image can accelerate export recognition and commercial success without guaranteeing the quality of every producer.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: recognizable positioning and consistent style support repeat purchase and export distribution.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
